steps.t: Relics can be found throughout Dol Acharn in eastern Dagorlad. You have arrived at Dol Acharn and discovered relics that might be of interest to Artam…
Artamir can be found at Haerondir in the Wastes. You have gathered many relics from Dol Acharn and should now deliver them to Artamir at Haerondir.
